data.title: TUNED Dodge Viper v Ford Mustang DRAG RACE_transcript

paragraphs.context: tuned dodge viper v ford mustang drag race _ transcript what will win between a previous generation ford mustang gt that has been fitted with a supercharger and now has 850 horsepower or a fifth generation dodge viper gtc? well, we ' re going to find out cuz we ' re going to race them over the standing quarter mile. i ' m watson and you ' re watching car wow. the ford mustang cs850 has a 5 l supercharged v8 that normally makes 454 horsepower, but it has been tuned by clive sutton. upgrades include a whipple supercharger, intercooler, and a new exhaust. so, it now puts out 850 horsepower and 92 newton meters of torque. it sends all that power to the rear wheels via a six - speed manual gearbox, and the car weighs in at around 1, 900 kg. it cost 115, 000 when new, including all the upgrades. this dodge viper gtc has also been tuned. its 8. 4 4 l naturally aspirated v10 has a new exhaust. so rather than developing 654 horsepower, it now puts out 710 horsepower and 786 new m of torque. it sends his power to the rear wheels via a six - speed manual gearbox, and it weighs in at 1, 560 kg. it cost him around £7, 000 when new. do you know what? this mustang feels like an absolute beast. i ' m not even driving it. it just seems powerful. so too is the manual gear shift in it. so solid. a real nice tight shift, but it ' s got some absolute weight to it. let ' s find out about the viper from its driver, racing driver samuel. > > hello, sam. how ' s your slice of american pie? > > do you know what? i absolutely love the viper. it ' s such a cool car. > > oh, i love it, too. i especially like the fact you ' ve got a little nurburg ring sign your winglets. > > yeah, that gives it validation, doesn ' t it? > > it does. would you like to hoon that round the nurburg ring? i could think of nothing scarier. > > oh, most certainly not. > > what do you think ' s going to happen? both very powerful. one ' s naturally aspirated, the other ' s supercharged. i ' ve got more power and torque, but i ' ve
